---
title: "Brevet 300 Vuelta Colliguay"
date: "2024-11-30"
categories: 
  - ciclismo
---

:::: {.tabla_ciclismo}
| Variable                | Valor     |
|------------------------:|-----------|
|**Distancia total:**     | 303.05 km |
|**Ascenso acumulado**    | 3,498 m   |
|**Velocidad promedio:**  | 18.6 km/h |
|**Tiempo en movimiento** |	16:17:45  |
|**Tiempo total**         | 21:12:20  |
::::

<div class="strava-embed-placeholder" data-embed-type="activity" data-embed-id="13020378402" data-style="standard"></div><script src="https://strava-embeds.com/embed.js"></script>
